name: claude-status-pro
description: Monitor Claude Code quota usage in real-time

claudeStatusPro.displayMode.description: Status bar display mode. percent: show percentage with mini bar. absolute: show used/limit count.

claudeStatusPro.statusBar.alignment.description: Status bar alignment. left: aligned to the left side of the status bar. right: aligned to the right side.

claudeStatusPro.updateAnimationDurationM.description: Duration of the moon update animation in milliseconds. Range: 500–10000. When new data arrives during animation, the timer resets.

claudeStatusPro.updateAnimationIntervalM.description: Frame interval of the moon update animation in milliseconds. Range: 100–2000. Controls how fast the moon phases cycle.

claudeStatusPro.statusBar.utilizationCol.description: Status bar text color when utilization is below 20%. Hex color string.
Status bar text color when utilization is 20%–40%. Hex color string.
Status bar text color when utilization is 40%–60%. Hex color string.
Status bar text color when utilization is 60%–80%. Hex color string.
Status bar text color when utilization is 80% or above. Hex color string.

claudeStatusPro.refreshIntervalSeconds.description: API refresh interval in seconds. Range: 30–∞. Long tick fetches quota from API.

claudeStatusPro.shortRefreshIntervalSeco.description: Local estimation refresh interval in seconds. Range: 1–60. Short tick reads local JSONL and estimates usage without API call.

claudeStatusPro.dataRetentionDays.description: Local usage data retention period in days. Range: 30–3650. Older entries are discarded during scan.

claudeStatusPro.weeklyBudget.description: Weekly budget in RMB. 0 means disabled. When cost7d exceeds this value, a warning is shown.

claudeStatusPro.heatmapDays.description: Number of days to show in the usage history heatmap.

claudeStatusPro.heatmapCycles5h.description: Number of 5h cycles to display in the heatmap. Range: 1–60.

claudeStatusPro.heatmapCycles7d.description: Number of 7d cycles to display in the heatmap. Range: 1–60.

claudeStatusPro.heatmapCycles30d.description: Number of 30d cycles to display in the heatmap. Range: 1–60.

claudeStatusPro.costCurveMaxPoints.description: Maximum number of data points for the cost curve. Range: 200–20000.

claudeStatusPro.chartHeightRatio.description: Height ratio for dashboard charts (canvas height = width * ratio).

claudeStatusPro.pricing.models.opus.inpu.description: Claude Opus input token price per million (USD).

claudeStatusPro.pricing.models.opus.outp.description: Claude Opus output token price per million (USD).

claudeStatusPro.pricing.models.opus.cach.description: Claude Opus cache-read token price per million (USD).
Claude Opus cache-write token price per million (USD).

claudeStatusPro.pricing.models.sonnet.in.description: Claude Sonnet input token price per million (USD).

claudeStatusPro.pricing.models.sonnet.ou.description: Claude Sonnet output token price per million (USD).

claudeStatusPro.pricing.models.sonnet.ca.description: Claude Sonnet cache-read token price per million (USD).
Claude Sonnet cache-write token price per million (USD).

claudeStatusPro.pricing.models.haiku.inp.description: Claude Haiku input token price per million (USD).

claudeStatusPro.pricing.models.haiku.out.description: Claude Haiku output token price per million (USD).

claudeStatusPro.pricing.models.haiku.cac.description: Claude Haiku cache-read token price per million (USD).
Claude Haiku cache-write token price per million (USD).

claudeStatusPro.pricing.officialUrl.description: Official pricing page URL shown in Dashboard.

claudeStatusPro.pricing.officialDate.description: Pricing publish date displayed next to the official pricing link (YYYY-MM-DD).

claudeStatusPro.defaultModelName.description: Default model name displayed when usage entry has no model information.

claudeStatusPro._pauseSignal.description: Internal: pause state broadcast signal (timestamp). Do not modify manually.
